description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Automatic Builds that triggers on push to the master branch. The workflow should have five jobs: build-linux, build-mac, build-windows, build-switch, and build-android, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-latest with devkitpro/devkita64:latest container, and ubuntu-latest respectively). Each job should install required dependencies, checkout the code, compile the project, and upload the artifact. Additionally, create an update-release job that depends on all build jobs, deletes the old release, downloads artifacts, packages them into zips, and creates a new release.
